global.description: The ad features a clean layout with placeholders for graphics and prominent text elements.
global.main_message: Promoting a financial tracking service with a call to action.

elements.label: Gray background
elements.description: A light gray background fills the top portion of the ad, providing a neutral base.

elements.label: Main graphic area
elements.description: A large rectangular area in the center, designed to hold key visuals or graphics, with a subtle outline.

elements.label: Graphic placeholder
elements.description: An empty rectangular shape within the main graphic area, suggesting a placeholder for an image or graphic.

elements.label: Secondary graphic placeholder
elements.description: A smaller rectangular shape within the main graphic area, indicating another placeholder for additional imagery.

elements.label: Additional graphic area
elements.description: A smaller rectangular area positioned slightly above the center, intended for supplementary graphics.

elements.label: Another graphic placeholder
elements.description: A rectangular shape within the main graphic area, designed to hold another visual element.

elements.label: Main headline text
elements.description: Bold text at the bottom of the ad reads 'Track every euro Built for peace of mind', emphasizing the main message.
elements.text_content: Track every euro Built for peace of mind

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A small button at the bottom with the text 'Get offer', inviting user interaction.

elements.label: Advertiser logo
elements.description: A small logo at the top left corner, labeled 'VaultRun', indicating the brand.

elements.label: Sale badge
elements.description: A small badge at the top right corner with the text 'SALE', highlighting a promotional offer.
